title: Birthday Money Story
resultGreatDescription: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} questions correct! You're learning smart financial decisions!
resultGreatNote: You correctly chose to save money in most situations. That's a smart habit!
resultKeepDescription: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} questions correct. Remember, saving some money for later is usually a smart choice!
resultKeepTip: Try to choose the option that saves money for later in most situations.

questions.text: You receive birthday money and want to use it wisely. What is the best first step?

options.text: Hide the money and forget about it
Decide how much to save and spend

questions.text: You want to buy a gift for your sibling using your birthday money. What does this show?
You see a toy you like, but you also want to save for something bigger later. What should you do?

options.text: Compare needs before making a choice

questions.text: Your parents suggest keeping your birthday money in a piggy bank. Why is this helpful?

options.text: It helps build a saving habit
It makes money difficult to use
It stops you from enjoying money

questions.text: After saving your birthday money, you feel proud of your effort. What skill are you learning?
